title: Shortest Path in an Unweighted Graph

entry_point.signature: bfs_shortest_path(graph: dict[str, list[str]], start: str, goal: str) -> list[str] | None

criteria.label: Correctness (shortest path)
criteria.description: Returns a path with the minimal number of edges between start and goal; correct on the provided test graphs.

criteria.label: Algorithmic understanding (BFS)
criteria.description: Uses a breadth-first strategy: a FIFO queue and a visited set. Not a depth-first traversal.

criteria.label: Edge cases
criteria.description: Handles start == goal, unreachable goal (returns None), and cyclic graphs (terminates).

criteria.label: Code quality
criteria.description: Readable, sensibly named, no dead code or debug prints.
